notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel plunked
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel hit by pitch. Jo Adell to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nick Madrigal GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Madrigal grounds into a double play, shortstop Ben Williamson to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Nolan Schanuel to 3rd. Denzer Guzman out at 2nd. Nick Madrigal out at 1st.
